sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂבך

Transliteration: śâbâk

Phonetic: saw-bawk'

BDB Definition:

  1. network, lattice-work, net, netting
    1. lattice
    2. net-ornament (on pillars)
    3. network, toils (for catching animals)

Origin: from an unused root meaning to entwine

TWOT entry: 2230

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
